_comment: Baked dogfood-marathon REPORT deck — a deterministic slidey scene spec so the slideshow room (host.slidey.render format:html) renders a real static-HTML report without a live author. A live drive overwrites this from the journaled run data via the kitsoki-mcp-driver; the structure here mirrors what build_deck.star encodes: title -> rollup -> per-case outcomes -> what-worked/what-didn't -> findings.

scenes.title: Backlog → pipeline → report
scenes.subtitle: Outcomes · cost · what worked · what didn't
scenes.narration: A backlog of cases driven through the inner pipeline, each deliverable independently verified, then decked.

scenes.title: Run rollup
scenes.narration: Counts and totals rolled up across every processed case.

scenes.body: Regression test, safe gate-parking, and the refine loop caught bad fixes a naive single prompt would have shipped.
scenes.narration: Structure isn't automatically cheaper, but it's more thorough — and it catches bad fixes a naive prompt would ship.

scenes.body: Every point of friction is captured as a finding and hardened generically — improve the pipeline for the general class, never overfit to one case.
scenes.narration: Each friction point becomes a finding that hardens the pipeline for the general class, never for one case.
